hero.title: Get paid for the ads you choose to watch
hero.blurb: Browse ads from brands you care about, earn tokens for your attention, and spend them with the merchants running the campaign.
hero.noCard: Free to join. No credit card needed.

featured.subtitle: Campaigns running right now, with the tokens each one pays.
featured.emptyDesc: No campaigns are featured at the moment. Browse everything that is live instead.

features.title: What advertisers get
features.subtitle: The reporting side of the platform, for the people paying for the campaigns.

ai.title: AI-Powered Optimization
ai.desc: Bid, budget and targeting adjustments are proposed from live campaign data. You approve them, or let the campaign apply them automatically.

realtime.title: Real-Time Analytics
realtime.desc: Monitor campaign performance, detect anomalies, and act instantly with our intuitive dashboard.

rewards.title: Reward-Based Engagement
rewards.desc: Incentivize user actions and build loyalty with our built-in rewards system.

heatmaps.title: Geographic Heatmaps
heatmaps.desc: Visualize ad performance across regions with interactive heatmaps powered by real-time location data.

anomalies.title: Anomaly Detection
anomalies.desc: Alerts when clicks, spend or traffic move outside their usual range, so a broken campaign does not run all weekend.

attribution.title: Cross-Device Attribution
attribution.desc: Track user journeys across desktop, mobile, and tablet to attribute conversions accurately.

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: How the tokens get from a campaign budget into your pocket.

browse.title: Browse
browse.desc: Explore a curated catalog of ads from top brands across various industries. Filter by what interests you.

engage.title: Engage
engage.desc: View and interact with ads that match your interests. Your attention is valued and rewarded.

earn.title: Earn
earn.desc: Tokens land in your balance. Spend them as a discount at the merchant, or keep stacking them.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Tokens, budgets and what the platform does with your data.
faq.q1: How do I earn rewards from ads?
faq.a1: Simply browse ads that interest you, view the content, and claim the reward shown. Rewards are credited to your account and can be cashed out once you reach the minimum balance.
faq.q2: Is it free for advertisers to join?
faq.a2: Yes. Creating an advertiser account is free. You only pay for the ad budget you allocate to campaigns, plus a small platform fee based on performance.
faq.q3: What makes SmartAdDeals different from other ad networks?
faq.a3: Consumers get paid for their attention instead of being tracked for it, and the merchant funding the campaign is the one who redeems the reward. The analytics side is ordinary: heatmaps, attribution and anomaly alerts.
faq.q4: How does the AI optimization work?
faq.a4: Our machine learning engine analyzes campaign performance in real time and recommends adjustments to bids, budgets, audiences, and creatives to improve ROAS.
faq.q5: Can I integrate SmartAdDeals with my existing ad accounts?
faq.a5: Yes. We offer integrations with major programmatic platforms and ad exchanges. Visit our developer docs to learn more about API and OAuth connections.

categories.title: Browse by Category
categories.subtitle: Jump straight to the industries you are interested in.

finalCta.title: Ready to start?
finalCta.desc: Sign up as a consumer to start earning, or as an advertiser to run your first campaign.

about.title: About SmartAdDeals
about.subtitle: An advertising platform where the person watching the ad gets paid for it.
about.missionP1: Online advertising pays everyone except the person actually watching. We wanted to try the other arrangement: the advertiser sets aside part of their discount, the consumer earns it by engaging, and the merchant hands it back at the till.
about.missionP2: The advertiser side is a normal analytics product. Campaign reporting, geographic heatmaps, cross-device attribution, anomaly alerts, and a narrative view that turns a campaign into something you can hand to a stakeholder.
about.valuesSubtitle: What we optimise for when the two sides disagree.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: Every ad reaches the right audience through intelligent targeting and AI-driven optimization.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Full audit trails, honest analytics, and no hidden fees. What you see is what you get.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We would rather ship an unusual mechanic that works than a familiar one that does not.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We believe users deserve value for their attention. Our reward system makes advertising a two-way street.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: We protect advertiser data and user privacy with enterprise-grade security and compliance.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.desc: Our AI Creative Generator helps brands produce compelling ad variations at scale.

about.journeySubtitle: Where the product has got to so far.

beginning.title: The Beginning
beginning.desc: SmartAdDeals founded with a mission to make advertising rewarding for everyone.

beta.title: Beta Launch
beta.desc: First 1,000 advertisers onboarded. AI optimization engine goes live.

global.title: Global Expansion
global.desc: Expanded to 50+ countries. Cross-device attribution launched.

creative.title: AI Creative Suite
creative.desc: Introduced AI-powered creative generation and A/B testing tools.

scale.title: 2M+ Daily Impressions
scale.desc: Reached 2.3 million daily ad impressions across 150+ countries.

about.ctaDesc: Advertisers run campaigns and see where the budget went. Consumers browse ads and earn tokens they can actually spend.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: We are building an ad platform that pays the audience. If that sounds like a problem worth working on, get in touch.

remote.title: Remote-First
remote.desc: Work from wherever you are. We hire for the work, not the postcode.

equity.title: Competitive Equity
equity.desc: All full-time employees receive meaningful equity so you share in the success you help build.

learning.title: Learning Budget
learning.desc: $2,000 annual learning budget for courses, conferences, books, or any growth opportunity.

flexible.title: Flexible Hours
flexible.desc: We care about output, not hours logged. Structure your day around your life.

careers.noRoleDesc: Send us your CV and tell us what you would want to work on.

careers.noRoles: There are no open roles right now.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: The brands and creators running campaigns on SmartAdDeals. Open a profile to see what they are advertising.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: A question, a bug, or a partnership idea. Pick whichever route suits.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we will respond as soon as possible.
contact.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree to our privacy policy and terms of service.
contact.sentBody: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your message and will respond shortly.
contact.sentToast: Message sent! We will get back to you soon.

faq.q1: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?
faq.a1: We aim to reply to all messages within one business day. Enterprise customers receive priority support.
faq.q2: Can I schedule a demo for my team?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Fill out the form with your company details and select "Sales demo" as the topic. Our team will reach out to schedule a time.
faq.q3: Do you offer custom enterprise plans?
faq.a3: Yes. We offer tailored plans for agencies and large advertisers. Contact our sales team for pricing and onboarding options.
faq.q4: Where can I find technical documentation?
faq.a4: Registered users can access our docs from the dashboard. You can also request API documentation through this form.

contact.noChannels: Contact details have not been published yet.

campaignCreate.consumerShareHint: Portion of the discount handed back as reward tokens.

campaignCreate.businessHint: Shown on this campaign's adverts so customers can find and reach you.
